channel.title: Stable Diffusion on Plot Twist Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Stable Diffusion on Plot Twist Daily

item.title: AI Art Copyright Bombshell: What the Supreme Court Ruling Actually Says
item.author: arty.craftson@pottersquill.com (Arty Craftson)
item.description:
The Ruling That Broke the Internet

Yesterday, the Supreme Court issued its decision in Anderson v. Stability AI — and if you’re going by headlines, you’d think it either saved or destroyed AI art depending on which outlet you read.

Here’s what the ruling actually says, what it means for AI artists, and why most coverage is missing the point.

The Case: What Was At Stake

Background: In 2024, artist Sarah Anderson sued Stability AI, Midjourney, and DeviantArt, claiming that training AI models on copyrighted images constituted infringement. She sought:
